center.name: Tamá Massif
center.summary: Tamá Massif是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝喉星额蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: tamai is found in the Tamá Massif in the western Venezuelan state of Táchira

links.evidence: tamai is found in the Tamá Massif in the western Venezuelan state of Táchira
